meta.site_title: Jordan Lake | Independent product design partner for SaaS and Web3
meta.site_description: A small studio helping founders ship a brand and product site they're actually proud of.

hero.greeting_line1: Hey there! This is your independent design partner,
hero.greeting_line2: building sharp brands for SaaS and Web3 teams.

work.footer_note: A few more cases are brewing 😅

projects.note_6: built with the Northline design team

story.section_title: Every detour along the way ended up teaching me something
story.secrets_line: No dark secrets here, just a lot of bright ones
story.bio_paragraph_1: I started out sketching shopfronts and skate graphics before I ever touched a computer, which is probably why I still think about layout the way a sign painter does. An architecture degree gave me structure; screens gave me a faster feedback loop.
story.bio_paragraph_2: These days I work out of a small studio near the coast, building web and brand systems for teams who'd rather ship something sharp than something safe.
story.bio_paragraph_3: I partner with builders pushing on something new — early-stage founders, lean in-house teams, and the occasional bootstrapped crew.
story.mission_statement: The goal: identities that hold up under scrutiny — consistent enough to scale, distinct enough to remember, and built to earn trust from day one.
story.partner_statement: I like working with people who move fast and still care about the details no one else notices.
